inbox_description: Nutrition question queue. Each question is submitted here (or via the GitHub Issue template), routed by the Diet Director (bot_21) to the matching department head, answered, and logged below.
how_to_submit: Open a GitHub Issue using the 'Nutrition Question' template, or add an entry directly to the 'questions' array below with status set to 'pending'.

questions.question: What foods are highest in iron and how can I absorb them better?
questions.answer: Example entry — replace with real questions. Iron-rich foods include red meat, lentils, spinach, and tofu. Pair them with vitamin C (e.g. citrus, bell peppers) to boost absorption. Avoid tea and coffee with iron-rich meals as tannins reduce absorption.

status_values.pending: Question submitted, waiting to be routed
status_values.routed: Director has forwarded the question to the correct department
